/usr/bin/ar qc libEngine.a CMakeFiles/Engine.dir/core/src/AssetManager.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Engine.dir/core/src/Camera.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Engine.dir/core/src/DeltaClock.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Engine.dir/core/src/Game.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Engine.dir/core/src/GameObject.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Engine.dir/core/src/KeyboardHandler.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Engine.dir/core/src/Mesh.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Engine.dir/core/src/Model.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Engine.dir/core/src/MouseHandler.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Engine.dir/core/src/Renderer.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Engine.dir/core/src/Shader.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Engine.dir/core/src/Shapes.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Engine.dir/core/src/Texture.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Engine.dir/core/src/Transform.cpp.o
/usr/bin/ranlib libEngine.a
